evals.expected_output: Claude should ask clarifying questions about site type and tech stack, then begin fetching the URL and running through audit categories systematically

evals.prompt: I just deployed my Next.js site to Netlify at https://mysite.netlify.app — can you check if everything looks good?
evals.expected_output: Claude should recognise this as a FAT trigger, note the tech stack (Next.js/Netlify), fetch the URL, and run the audit without needing to ask for the URL or stack

evals.prompt: Audit my site https://example.com — I only care about SEO
evals.expected_output: Claude should focus the audit on SEO checks (section 1.2) but briefly mention it can run a full audit if desired. Should check title, meta, headings, OG tags, sitemap, robots.txt, and structured data

evals.prompt: What's left to fix from the FAT audit?
evals.expected_output: Claude should reference the current punch list status from the conversation, showing resolved vs remaining items with their priority levels

evals.prompt: I've redeployed with the fixes — can you re-check?
evals.expected_output: Claude should re-fetch the URL, verify the specific issues that were previously flagged, and report which are resolved vs still present. Should update the punch list.
